author.name: Simon King, Sébastien Le Maguer, Luciana Ferrer, Tomi Kinnunen, Esther Klabbers, Antoine Serrurier

description: Official LaTeX Paper Kit for Interspeech 2025. Provides double-blind review support with a camera-ready toggle, structured author/affiliation handling with numbered affiliation superscripts, keyword and abstract fields, line numbering for the review version, and IEEE-format bibliography, based on a custom document class maintained by ISCA.
